title: Muhurat: The Art of Choosing Auspicious Moments
excerpt: Every moment carries a different cosmic quality. Muhurat is the Vedic science of selecting that precise window when celestial energies align — for weddings, travel, new ventures, and key decisions.

title: Nadi Astrology: Ancient Secrets of Palm-Leaf Manuscripts
excerpt: Hidden in dusty Tamil Nadu libraries lie thousands of palm-leaf manuscripts written by ancient sages who claimed to foresee specific individual fates. Nadi astrology remains one of the most mysterious traditions in all of Jyotisha.

title: How to Read Your Kundali: A Beginner's Guide
excerpt: Your Kundali is a map of the sky at the exact moment you were born. It holds twelve houses, nine planets, and twelve signs — each telling a different chapter of your life. Here is how to begin reading it.

title: KP System vs Vedic Astrology: What's the Difference?
excerpt: Both systems trace their roots to the same ancient sky. But Krishnamurti Paddhati takes a different path — more surgical, more predictive, built on sub-lord theory. Understanding where they diverge changes how you read charts.

title: Mangal Dosha: Separating Myths from Vedic Truth
excerpt: Few topics in Indian astrology cause as much anxiety as Mangal Dosha. But most of what circulates — that it guarantees early death of a spouse, that only a Manglik can marry a Manglik — is far removed from classical texts.

title: Rahu Mahadasha: Effects, Challenges, and Remedies
excerpt: Rahu's 18-year Mahadasha is one of the most transformative periods a person can undergo. It amplifies ambition, blurs boundaries, and pushes you into unfamiliar territory. The question is not whether it will change you — it will — but how to navigate it.

title: What is Sade Sati? Saturn's 7.5-Year Transit Explained
excerpt: Sade Sati is one of the most discussed transits in Vedic astrology. For seven and a half years, Saturn moves through three consecutive signs touching your Moon sign. But what does it really mean for your life?
